perturbation.original_text: Ocean Time Warner Cable will provide Watchit with data on viewership to both Channel 777 and specifically to the content provided by Watchit.
perturbation.changed_text: Ocean Time Warner Cable will endeavor to provide Watchit with data on viewership to both Channel 777 and specifically to the content provided by Watchit, but makes no guarantees as to the accuracy or availability of such data. Oceanic Time Warner Cable is not obligated to provide viewership data if doing so requires significant resources or compromises viewer privacy.
perturbation.explanation: This creates an in-text contradiction: Initially, Oceanic Time Warner Cable 'will provide' viewership data. The changed text introduces exceptions, stating they 'endeavor to provide' but makes no guarantees, and they are not obligated to provide it under certain conditions. This contradicts the original obligation. Adding the wording "endeavor to provide" and "no guarantees" create uncertainty and contradicts the original clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Ocean Time Warner Cable will endeavor to provide Watchit with data on viewership to both Channel 777 and specifically to the content provided by Watchit, but makes no guarantees as to the accuracy or availability of such data. Oceanic Time Warner Cable is not obligated to provide viewership data if doing so requires significant resources or compromises viewer privacy.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction. The original text implies a firm commitment to providing viewership data. The changed text weakens this commitment by adding 'endeavor to provide' and 'no guarantees,' and also creates exceptions based on resource constraints and privacy concerns. This directly conflicts with the implied obligation in the original text, making it unclear whether Oceanic Time Warner Cable is actually required to provide the data, thus causing an in-text contradiction.
